title: Amazing Digital Discs
description: Do you also love The Amazing Digital Circus series? Enjoy the official Soundtrack in disc form!
body:
[![RubyHost Partnership](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/734de55b9d68de8d0d141c95b975144be608660a_0.webp)](https://billing.rubyhost.net/aff.php?aff=22)

# You can use this mod in your modpack freely.

**Discs:** This mod adds all the songs from the official TADC soundtrack from the first episode, all discs are obtainable in survival.

**Sheets:** Every disc has a sheet with the same pattern as the discs and using them together with a blank disc in the recorder to record the disc.

### I intend to add all the songs from the series as more episodes are released.

# MusicalLib is required to work properly

## She still thinks this is a dream.

**I have no plans to carry the mod to any past version of Forge or any of Fabric, if you find a bug please report so i can solve it right away.**

**Do not install this mod from any other site, it's fake and may contain viruses or unwanted software, i only post mods on Curseforge or Modrinth and always go by the name ItsRuby05.**
